{
  IProcessor.ProcessorKeys.g.cs:
using System;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    public static partial class ProcessorKeys
    {
        public const string Fast = "fast";
        public const string Slow = "slow";
    }
}// <auto-generated />
// Generated by DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators.RegisterStrategyGenerator
,
  IProcessor.ProcessorRegistry.g.cs:
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using DesignPatterns.Behavioral;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    public static partial class ProcessorRegistry
    {
        private static readonly IStrategyRegistry<string, global::TestAssembly.IProcessor> _instance = new StrategyRegistry<string, global::TestAssembly.IProcessor>(new Dictionary<string, global::TestAssembly.IProcessor> { ["fast"] = new global::TestAssembly.FastProcessor(), ["slow"] = new global::TestAssembly.SlowProcessor() });
        public static IStrategyRegistry<string, global::TestAssembly.IProcessor> Instance
        {
            get
            {
                return _instance;
            }
        }
    }
}// <auto-generated />
// Generated by DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators.RegisterStrategyGenerator

}
